{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220309301FE363EE0AE85614A4F5"}"},"total":480},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7495773163736531737","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结了 第一本好看到我看连载 好不舍啊[快哭了][快哭了]这本小说故事情节美好到不真实 希望“他们”在平行时空依旧幸福美满"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745249687,"group_id":"7220830225066626082","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3690419178707229"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220830225066626082","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"848"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读64小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":47,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":229751,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":26},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7387026829066208025","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"呜呜呜 谁懂啊！！！真的超级无敌巨好看[爱慕]作者文笔绝了 并不是千篇一律的马甲文 也没有那些重生的老套路 晚晚和三爷之间何尝不是相互救赎 三爷会后悔没有早点找到晚晚 重来一世 他要给她最好的结局 是无爱者遇到心软的神明
很多马甲文都是为了爽而爽 这本书真的让我眼前一亮又一亮✨童年阴影 缺爱 所以才会患抑郁症的 真的很心疼晚晚[快哭了]三爷重生回来第一件事情就是接她的妻子回家 会在檀园各处种植上千万的安神花 把晚晚当小孩子一样宠
特喜欢老师说的一句话 重生是一次生命的觉醒 晚晚从来没有想过被爱 三爷却一步步把她拉出黑暗
笔记99+ 爆灯爆灯爆灯!!!![舔屏]好看到什么程度 连载就忍不住发书评","text_exts":[{"e":155,"s":152,"text":"抑郁症","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%8A%91%E9%83%81%E7%97%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741201715614A4F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227387026829066208025%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227220830225066626082%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%8A%91%E9%83%81%E7%97%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719928281,"group_id":"7220830225066626082","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"醒醒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6dR3J0WtvrJeDyLe5YYPOZZAfbkmRREtx87nDPQQm3E","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/000f546ddef34b879ac90cb5c4431c4f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703124&x-signature=91XYgGFakibI296f01I%2FNYFioXw%3D","user_id":"3690419178707229","user_name":"chen醒醒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3690419178707229","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220830225066626082","book_info":{"abstract":"【疯批大小姐x病娇贵公子，双重生+马甲+女强+虐渣+救赎+团宠】
圈里人谁不知道，虞家大小姐就是一个从小爹不疼娘不爱，还被丢到小县城里自生自灭，什么都不会的草包，听说连大学都没上过，这样的草包竟然能跟京城那位大佬联姻？！
-
被接回虞家后，虞归晚那对冷漠的父母只说了句，“嫁到江家要好好地讨好江三爷。”
却没想到那位传说中的江三爷竟然亲自来虞家接她回家。
来到别墅的第一天，他只说，“这里以后就是你的家，你想做什么就做什么，不用管其他人。”
她眼底无波，乖巧地应了声，“好。”
-
圈里人都准备看这位虞家大小姐什么时候被赶出江家，却在某次宴会被人撞见，那位矜贵冷漠的江三爷单膝跪地，就为了给那位虞家大小姐换鞋。
相反，大小姐坐在椅子上，手里拿着小蛋糕，居高临下地看着男人，懒懒地催他，“好了没？”
男人低笑，温柔缱绻，“好了。”
-
原以为是小草包攀上高枝，却没想到这是个真大佬。
万金难求的神医圣手，娱乐圈红极一时的天坛歌后、神级词曲，香水界顶级调香师，珠宝界顶尖设计师......
男人看着这些小马甲，没忍住失笑。
虞归晚面无表情地看着他，“扒够了没？”
-
虞归晚从来都没想过会有人想救赎她。
可江聿怀说，他想给她一个最好的结局。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/36a24be5a75ad59af49905306228b29c","author":"舒念是苏苏","author_id":"","book_id":"7220830225066626082","book_name":"疯批大小姐不装后，大佬拎刀善后","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7286228442054394430","read_count":"15219","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2387893"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1165","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,重生,女强,团宠,病娇,虐渣,大小姐,大佬,打脸,位尊权重","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c9d905210782996afa22fc6449c1ae2f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304171&x-signature=fkw5pchWs66NqmVGNS6GGxitG2o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4345694749459176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220309301FE363EE0AE85614A4F5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":97971,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":48509},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1719933465,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7464599035887584062","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"“是满目萧条的冬天终于迎来了万物复苏的春天。”也是无爱者终于遇到了心软的神被赐予了一份独一无二的爱意。
这份爱意，就像春天一样
一切都是那样的生机勃勃。
“她说，既然她这一生注定贵不可言，那她便用这一生的无忧顺遂，富贵尊荣来换一人重获新生。”
“即便，众叛亲离，爱而不得。”
“她只要他活。”
本书非常十分好看，反转很多，反转反转再反转，只有你想不到，没有作者写不到，真的很好看，一口气看到更新的章节，希望作者大大赶紧更[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]，总而言之是很甜很甜的文哦，小虐小虐（看到后面才有点太虐了，不过真的是很好看的），男主真的是很爱很爱女主，真的，言语无法形容，女主也很好很好，总而言之这本书是真的很好很好看。大家都快来看，真的很好很好看。[大笑][大笑][大笑][大笑][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]。。。[爱慕][舔屏][舔屏][大笑][大笑][大笑][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737989957,"group_id":"7220830225066626082","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活总是惊喜不断","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9vGQvsQ8mpeBXsSACK/oyWX2opatbcW3h5OQrQ6m9pf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/45d6e55a833545e9a2d6d5449a95d622~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709104&x-signature=HTRrRArgDUJyrDTHOXS%2FZHqaUmA%3D","user_id":"3061512529523623","user_name":"喜欢贝叶棕的马鸣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3061512529523623","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220830225066626082","book_info":{"abstract":"【疯批大小姐x病娇贵公子，双重生+马甲+女强+虐渣+救赎+团宠】
